generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when Germany only spent 1.2% of GDP on defense last year? Meanwhile, we're stretched thin protecting everyone. It's not about isolationism, it's about fair burden-sharing. Our veterans deserve better than carrying the world on their shoulders while others look the other way. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
